text: The surgeon completes the hepatic flexure mobilization, connecting two dissection planes to reach the proximal transverse colon at the distal resection margin. The duodenum is identified and the dissection continues on top of it, aiming to complete the lateral to medial aspect. A Raytech is placed on the duodenum to guide the dissection through the thick mesentery. The surgeon reaches the root of the ileocolic vessels, cleaning the ileocolic vein from the ileal side through the ileal mesentery, and prepares to select the distal resection margin through the colonic mesentery.
